tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose tolerance or possible early diabetes. Creatinine is slightly elevated, suggesting reduced renal function. Chloride is marginally high but likely not clinically significant. Lipid profile is within acceptable limits. Recommend follow-up for glycemic control and renal function monitoring.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
